name: Cubin
short_description: Cubin is a first-person platform puzzle game that immerses you in the LGA experience. Complete 60 experiments to discover the truth about this simulation.
detailed_description:
Cubin is a first-person puzzle-platform game that immerses you in the LGA experience. During your journey, you'll meet Alice, who will help and guide you through the finer points of the experience. Pick up the gravity cube and interact with the control room to complete and pass through a new, ever more complex experiment.

Prepare to think, glide, fly, explode and also encounter failure. Discover yourself, who you really are on this adventure, how far you can go...
At the same time, discover what lies behind this rather dubious experiment.




Game features
  • Complete 60 increasingly complex experiments
  • 6 different endings
  • Use the control room to get an overview of the experiment
  • Press the buzzer in the control room to activate an event during an experiment.
  • Get to know Alice, who will help and guide you throughout your experiment.
  • Easy to learn and fully customizable

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Japanese, Norwegian, Dutch, Turkish, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Swedish, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
